data_out.description: pytest test execution report showing all tests passed
Installed biosynfoni package in development mode with dev dependencies

domain_knowledge: Development mode installation (`pip install -e .[dev]`) installs the package in editable form with all development dependencies, allowing local source changes to be immediately reflected without reinstallation.
The `[dev]` extras specifier in setup.py/pyproject.toml defines the additional dependencies required for development (such as pytest and black) separate from base runtime requirements.
pytest discovery and execution from the tests/ directory follows convention of locating and running all test files matching test_*.py or *_test.py patterns.
A successful test suite run (all tests passing) is the primary signal of package reproducibility and functional correctness at the tool level.

workflow_description: 1. Clone or navigate to the biosynfoni repository root directory. 2. Install the package in development mode using pip with dev dependencies via `pip install -e .[dev]`. 3. Execute the complete test suite using pytest on the tests/ directory with `pytest tests/`. 4. Verify all tests pass and package is functional.
